description.value: Aura medium transmutation; CL 3rd; Slot none; Price 8,301 gp; Weight 3 lbs. DESCRIPTION A razored rope is a + 1 lasso made out of tightly braided lengths of fine chain, used to help restrain cowards attempting to flee a battle. It can be used to entangle an opponent as normal, but deals 1d4 points of damage to a creature that attempts to slip free and fails. The razored rope is also more difficult to escape from, requiring a DC 18 Escape Artist check to slip free from and a DC 28 Strength check to break. If your patron is a god of battle, as a standard action you can cause the lasso to constrict around a creature already entangled by the rope, dealing 1d4 points of damage. If your patron is not a god of battle and you attempt to make the lasso constrict, it lashes up and strikes you for 1d4 points of damage. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, animate rope; Cost 4,150 gp
